SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL RECEIPT TO SORRENTINO RETURNED, SIGNED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUMONT, LUCILLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SORRENTINO, MICHAEL IND/DBA CALIF. THERMAL WINDOWS $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,021.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SORRENTINO, MICHAEL IND/DBA CALIF. THERMAL WINDOWS HEARING SET FOR SEP-20-1995 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF SEP-20-1995, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-31-1995, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-01-1995 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUMONT, LUCILLE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SORRENTINO, MICHAEL IND/DBA CALIF. THERMAL WINDOWS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
